title: KAPP-Sen TMC: Term Placenta Subject Selection Criteria
description: {"blocks":[{"key":"4ijgv","text":"Patient samples will be obtained during an elected cesarean (c-section) delivery. We will enroll an equal number of male and female fetuses.","type":"unstyled","depth":0,"inlineStyleRanges":[],"entityRanges":[],"data":{}}],"entityMap":{}}
steps: Inclusion Between the age of 18-50 years of age Currently having a single birth (e.g. one baby) Pregnancy is the result of natural conception Elected for physician to perform a cesarean section for delivery Pregnancy reaches full term (≥ 37 weeks)

Exclusion Pregravid BMI > 35 Any health conditions including diabetes mellitus, cardiovascular disease, hypertension, or inflammatory disease Any history of preeclamptic or complicated pregnancy prior to current pregnancy
creator: Sergii Domanskyi
